title: Fisheries: agreed records of consultations and distribution reports for North-East Atlantic mackerel, blue whiting and Norwegian spring spawning herring 2026
body: "The coastal States consultations concern the following parties:   UK  EU  Faroe Islands  Greenland Iceland Norway Russian Federation   Agreed record of consultations   These are the agreed records of the annual fisheries consultations on the management of blue whiting, Norwegian spring spawning herring and mackerel in the North-East Atlantic.   Distribution reports   The parties support the ongoing publication of distribution reports for stocks of:   mackerel blue whiting Norwegian spring spawning herring   These reports help the coastal States to have a better understanding of where the stocks are located throughout the year. They are updated each year to provide the most accurate and up-to-date information that is available.  "
